title: Namespaces
text:
In Kubernetes,
namespaces
provide a mechanism for isolating groups of resources within a single cluster. Names of resources need to be unique within a namespace, but not across namespaces. Namespace-based scoping is applicable only for namespaced
objects
(e.g. Deployments, Services, etc.)
and not for cluster-wide objects
(e.g. StorageClass, Nodes, PersistentVolumes, etc.)
.
